entities.description: Unofficial seed production and distribution channels, including neighbors and own harvests

entities.name: PUBLIC SEED SYSTEMS
entities.description: Government-led seed supply systems that often rely on subsidies

entities.name: INFORMAL SURVEY
entities.description: Data collection method used to gather information from institutions and members

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD SURVEY
entities.description: Data collection method used to gather information from 302 rural households

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION PROJECTS
entities.description: Investment-funded initiatives aimed at increasing seed production

entities.name: SEED SECURITY STOCKS
entities.description: Reserves of seed maintained to ensure availability during crises

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental condition that necessitates the maintenance of seed security stocks

entities.name: SEED MULTIPLICATION AND DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The process of increasing seed quantity and delivering new varieties to farmers
